warnings: This index confirms the sanitary discipline set for house #2 runs exactly SN-01..SN-08 (8 sheets), matching pages 36-43 one-to-one (SN-01=png36 ... SN-08=png43).

This differs from house #1's sanitary set, which only had 7 sheets (SN-01..SN-07) with no separate roof-drainage sheet -- house #2 adds SN-05 'แปลนระบบสุขาภิบาลหลังคา' (roof sanitary/drainage plan) as its own sheet, which shifts SN-06/07/08 relative to house #1's SN-05/06/07 numbering for the pipe-installation-detail and hanger-spacing sheets.
Page also contains two other tables (pipe type schedule, symbol legend) captured in sibling files.

Read directly from this page's own image (not copied from house #1). Content is genuinely near-identical to house #1's page26 index table apart from the drawing number (SN-58079 vs SN-58078), plan_type label ('บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 2' vs '...1'), and the extra SN-05 roof-plan row -- both houses evidently share the same standard sanitary drawing-set template/boilerplate from the same design office.
